title: Essentials
description: Essentials expands automation and redstone in a balanced and vanilla style.
body: # Essentials Essentials expands automation and redstone in a balanced and vanilla style. While there's full ingame documentation with Patchouli installed (strongly recommended), here's a few highlights: - A single block chest that remembers item types for each slot - Farmland that self-replants - Simple and cheap item transport and sorting - Single-block redstone circuits that can do logic or math - And more... Essentials has no worldgen, no balance destroying features, has ingame documentation, and is highly configurable. It can be dropped into a modpack without issues. ### Spotlight ### Full Tutorial Previous versions are on the [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/essentials).
